title: ricotia candiriana
intro: Ricotia candiriana, also known as the hairy ball or hairy balsam, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Ricotia candiriana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture by steeping its leaves and flowers in hot water or ethanol, and can also be applied topically in the form of a poultice or cream to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
